summary: Added a lane-local Gate Radar panel that visualizes blockers, service requests, and promotion gates as radar pings with pressure stats, gate cards, and local COM/Q/PATH controls.

pattern_notes: Risk matrices and heat maps help prioritize high-impact risks quickly.
Blocker management UI should distinguish issues that stop progress from softer impediments.
Project risk dashboards benefit from clear action routing so operators know where to resolve the blocker.
A game-like radar view can preserve urgency and atmosphere while still exposing the actual blocker text and next action.

data_contract: gateRadarItems(lane) derives pings from lane.gateMap, lane.serviceRequests, and fallback promotion gates.
gateRadarStats(lane, items) derives gates, review, requests, and pressure without adding schema.
renderGateRadar(lane) appears in Overview after Minigame Forge and before the legacy World Module.
COM and PATH are local detail navigation; Q only stages a browser-local blocker-review draft.
ui_notes: The radar scope uses concentric rings, pings, and a central pressure readout.
Gate cards keep blocker body and next action visible beside the visual scope.
Mobile layout stacks the radar and console while keeping stats and actions in two-column/touch-friendly grids.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: panel false, pings 0, stats 0, cards 0, actions []

green.result: ok true; panel true; pings 1; stats 4; cards 1; actions [comms,path,queue]; Q changed label to OK and stagedCount to 1 staged; PATH opened Path Map; COM opened Comms; no clipped text or console errors.

responsive: phone 390: ok true, panel true, pings 1, cards 1, actions 3, boardColumns 1, statColumns 2, pageOverflow false, clipped []
tablet 820: ok true, panel true, pings 1, cards 1, actions 3, boardColumns 1, statColumns 2, pageOverflow false, clipped []
desktop 1280: ok true, panel true, pings 1, cards 1, actions 3, boardColumns 2, statColumns 4, pageOverflow false, clipped []
wide 1600: ok true, panel true, pings 1, cards 1, actions 3, boardColumns 2, statColumns 4, pageOverflow false, clipped []
static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, web/README.md

next_actions: Add a gate severity filter for local-only, browser, account, public, payment, or real-money gate categories.
Generate realm-specific radar skins so different minigame lanes visualize blockers with different atmosphere.
Add optional local notes to staged gate-review drafts without mutating snapshot data.
